description_long: This object is a futuristic, military-style airplane with a distinctive forward-swept wing configuration and a prominent, rounded nose section. The fuselage is angular and armored, with ribbed and panel-like surface details suggesting reinforced construction. The wings are broad and slightly downward-canted, with mechanical appendages or weapon mounts at the tips. The rear of the airplane features a tall, vertical stabilizer integrated into a single, downward-swept tail boom, and the engine area is heavily ribbed with visible exhaust ports. The cockpit is centrally located, enclosed, and shielded by a dark, reinforced canopy. The overall color scheme is a muted, military green with metallic and weathered accents.
description: A futuristic, military-style airplane with forward-swept wings, a rounded nose, and a ribbed, armored fuselage in muted green. It features a central enclosed cockpit and a distinctive downward-swept tail boom.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, central cockpit canopy, and broad, forward-swept wings with mechanical details at the tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated nose, ribbed engine section, and the downward-swept tail boom with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine exhausts, the back of the cockpit, and the full span of the wings with their downward cant.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ribbed engine area, tail boom, and the mechanical details on the wing tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, forward-swept wings with slight anhedral angle and mechanical appendages at the tips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust ports integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Single downward-swept tail boom with an integrated vertical stabilizer; unconventional tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear with visible main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Central, forward-mounted enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single-seat.
